comments: This is exactly what DeFi needs - real governance power for users instead of just hype. Love the fair launch approach!
The incentive alignment here is brilliant - finally getting rewarded for actually contributing to protocol success.
Excited to see how this plays out on MegaETH - community-owned liquidity is the future!
content:
Most DeFi protocols chase hype. MarbMarket built something different: a system where your vote actually matters.

veDEX isn't just another DEX. It's a community-owned liquidity mine where your MARB locks turn into real governance power. Longer locks = more influence + more rewards.

The magic? Projects pay bribes for votes. Your voting power attracts rewards that flow back to you. It's a flywheel that rewards early believers.

MarbMarket's launching on MegaETH with no presale, no VCs—just fair launch LP farming and weekly voting. First of its kind.

Your locked MARB directs emissions. LPs get rewards. Protocols pay bribes. Incentives cycle back to you.

x.com/Marb_market

@RallyOnChain this is what happens when governance aligns incentives—no more centralized control of liquidity.
